creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Sorry for closing this 3 1/2 year old PR with only this, but: 

Your patch would break people who use /etc/make.conf to set  
MASTER_SITE_OVERRIDE, since it unconditionally adds DIST_SUBDIR. 
Therefore, we can't accomodate people who wish to set this variable 
in the shell.
